description: Composition Blue shorts for men made of 100% polyester, has an elastic waistband with a drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides, zipped pocket at the back, white panels on the sides and an embroidered nike swoosh above the left hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built with the breathable comfort and zero-distraction fit athletes demands for focus, these nike shorts are great for your workouts at the gym or just a stroll in the park. These high-performance shorts feature a supportive Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the body leaving you fresh and rejuvenated.
